---
title: "Repro"
output: html_document
---

# Perform basic analyses, output figures and tables for Repro data

``` {r BasicStats}

### Stats for Repro 
# Repro by section
ReproStats <- Repro %>%
  mutate(AnalysisDate = as.Date(floor_date(TripDate, unit = "month")),
         Plot_Date = as.Date(AnalysisDate + 14)) %>%
  count(AnalysisDate, Plot_Date, Estuary, SectionName, Sex, name = "count") %>%
  mutate(percent = count / sum(count) * 100)
  
```

``` {r Repro Figures}
ggplot(ReproStats, aes(x = Plot_Date, y = percent, fill = Sex)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack") +
  labs(
    title = "Oyster Sex Composition by Month",
    x = "Month",
    y = "Percentage of Oysters",
    fill = "Sex"
  ) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)

```

``` {Repro Text}
### Placeholder for Repro text for report
```
This is text to output for Repro
